title: Profiling of pancreatic adenocarcinoma using artificial intelligence-based integration of  multi-omic and computational pathology features - Validation Data Sets
author: Arsen, Osipov
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Two public validation cohorts were utilized in the MT-Pilot study, the Cancer Genome Atlas (TCGA) and cohort-1 Johns Hopkins University (JHU). These datasets included DNA, RNA, clinical data, and tissue protein analytes analyzed for survival outcome prediction using AI/Machine Learning modeling.
steps_raw: Two public validation cohorts were utilized in the MT-Pilot study, the Cancer Genome Atlas (TCGA) and cohort-1 Johns Hopkins University (JHU). These datasets included DNA, RNA, clinical data, and tissue protein analytes analyzed for survival outcome prediction using AI/Machine Learning modeling.
